title: Anthropic Pulls Ahead of OpenAI in High-Stakes Race for IPO Riches
title_cn: Anthropic 在 IPO 财富的高风险竞赛中领先 OpenAI
summary: Anthropic PBC pulled ahead of OpenAI with its confidential IPO filing Monday, as the free-spending artificial intelligence startups battle for a fundraising edge that’s set to determine who will win the ultimate battle for computing power.

title: Oil Edges Down After Biggest Gain in a Month on US-Iran Standoff
title_cn: 油价在美伊僵局一个月来最大涨幅后小幅下跌
summary: Oil ticked lower on optimism around the prospects of a US-Iran peace deal flagged by President Donald Trump, a day after prices surged on signs that an agreement was floundering.

title: Euro-Zone Inflation Surpasses 3% for First Time Since 2023
title_cn: 欧元区通胀自 2023 年以来首次突破 3%
summary: Euro-area inflation topped 3% for the first time in more than 2 1/2 years, cementing expectations for an interest-rate hike when the European Central Bank meets next week.

title: Galaxy Digital Sets Up Prediction Market OTC Derivatives Desk
title_cn: Galaxy Digital 设立预测市场场外衍生品柜台
summary: Crypto finance conglomerate Galaxy Digital Inc. has launched a trading desk to offer large investors better access to prediction markets via over-the-counter derivatives similar to those used in markets from interest rates to commodities.

title: Philip Morris Cuts Outlook on $500 Million Canada Writedown
title_cn: 菲利普莫里斯下调加拿大 5 亿美元减记预期
summary: Philip Morris International Inc. cut its profit forecast for this fiscal year after writing down the value of its investment in its Canadian affiliate by $500 million.

title: India Bargains Hard in Key US, UK Trade Talks This Week
title_cn: 印度本周在美国和英国的重要贸易谈判中大力讨价还价
summary: India is seeking to safeguard exporters’ interests in trade negotiations with the US and UK this week, with implications for trade deals with two of its major partners.

title: Swiss Watch Exports Drop, Skewed by 2025 Rush Before US Tariffs
title_cn: 瑞士手表出口下降，2025 年美国加征关税前夕将出现倾斜
summary: Swiss watch exports fell in April from a year earlier, when companies were rushing to get stock into the US ahead of higher tariffs.

title: UBS Offers First AT1 Bond Since Swiss Authorities Paused Reforms
title_cn: 瑞银发行瑞士当局暂停改革以来首支 AT1 债券
summary: UBS Group AG is set to raise Additional Tier 1 capital in US dollars, its first foray into the market since Switzerland paused plans to tighten rules on the riskiest type of bank debt.

title: Goldman Said to Work on Retailer IPO, Boosting Kuwait Push
title_cn: 高盛称将致力于零售商首次公开募股，推动科威特的发展
summary: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. is working on a potential initial public offering of a Kuwaiti online beauty and fashion retailer, a deal that could mark the Wall Street bank’s first listing mandate in the Gulf nation as it seeks to expand there.

title: Fitch Ratings Sees Strait of Hormuz Reopening in July
title_cn: 惠誉评级预计霍尔木兹海峡将于七月重新开放
summary: Fitch Ratings' Angelina Valavina discusses the outlook for the oil market, saying the firm's current assumption is for the Strait of Hormuz to reopen in July. She speaks on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Stocks Stall as Traders Parse Mideast Signals: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 由于交易员解析中东信号，美国股市停滞不前：市场结束
summary: A rally in US stocks is pausing after the artificial-intelligence trade fueled the S&P 500’s longest winning streak in more than a year, with investors gauging the prospects of an end to the war in the Middle East.

title: India’s Key Monsoon Rains Set to Begin Days After Official Start
title_cn: 印度主要季风降雨将在正式开始几天后开始
summary: India’s annual monsoon rains that are crucial for farm output are likely to arrive around Thursday at Kerala state on the country’s southern tip, a few days after the official start date.

title: Euro’s Global Role Gains Slightly But Still Distant From Dollar
title_cn: 欧元的全球地位略有提升，但与美元仍有差距
summary: International use of the euro rose slightly in 2025 but stayed well below that of the dollar, highlighting the difficulty of mounting a global challenge to the greenback’s supremacy.

title: EU Lawmakers Clear US Trade Deal for Final Approval
title_cn: 欧盟立法者批准美国贸易协议以供最终批准
summary: European Union lawmakers gave preliminary approval to a US trade deal, clearing a path for final ratification before President Donald Trump’s threatened deadline to impose new tariffs.

title: FTSE 100 Lags as AI Enthusiasm Boosts European Stocks
title_cn: 人工智能热情提振欧洲股市，富时 100 指数落后

title: Horizons Middle East & Africa 6/2/2026
title_cn: 中东和非洲地平线 6/2/2026
summary: Horizons Middle East & Africa is your daily spotlight on one of the world's fastest-growing regions. Live from Dubai, we bring you the latest global markets and analysis, plus news-making interviews, with a special focus on MEA. All that and more, as you head to the office in the Gulf, pause for lunch in Hong Kong, or start your day in London or Johannesburg.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Copper and Aluminum Power Higher on Global Demand, War Outlook
title_cn: 铜和铝电力因全球需求和战争前景而走高
summary: Copper climbed closer to $14,000 a ton and aluminum surged to its highest in more than four years as the unresolved conflict in the Middle East and optimism over demand powered gains.

title: AI Rally Tested Even as Korea Surges Past India | Insight with Haslinda Amin 06/02/2026
title_cn: 韩国超越印度，人工智能拉力赛仍经受考验哈斯琳达·阿明的见解 06/02/2026
summary: Insight with Haslinda Amin, a daily news program featuring in-depth, high-profile interviews and analysis to give viewers the complete picture on the stories that matter. The show features prominent leaders spanning the worlds of business, finance, politics and culture. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rolls-Royce CEO on Carrying the Weight of British Business
title_cn: 劳斯莱斯首席执行官谈肩负英国商业的重担
summary: Rolls-Royce's turnaround made Tufan Erginbilgiç one of the most closely-watched CEOs in Europe. He tells Bloomberg's Francine Lacqua that UK companies don’t need to move to the US to be successful. The segment is part of his interview on Leaders With Francine Lacqua. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Commodities in ‘Super-Squeeze’ as Hormuz Risks Build, HSBC Says
title_cn: 汇丰银行称，霍尔木兹海峡风险加剧，大宗商品面临“超级挤压”
summary: Commodities are in a “super-squeeze” that will worsen if the Strait of Hormuz remains effectively shut, according to HSBC Holdings Plc.

title: State Street Head Trader Says Won May Rebound in Second Half
title_cn: 道富银行首席交易员称韩元可能在下半年反弹
summary: The South Korean won could rebound in the second half of the year as foreign selling of local equities eases and persistent current-account surpluses support the currency, according to a State Street Bank and Trust Co. trader with more than 25 years at the firm.

title: China Tech Stocks Defy Asia Selloff | The China Show 6/2/2026
title_cn: 中国科技股逆袭亚洲抛售|中国展 2026 年 6 月 2 日
summary:
"Bloomberg: The China Show is your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy.  From politics and policy to tech and trends, David Ingles gives global investors unique insight, delivering in-depth discussions with the newsmakers who matter."
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Elliott Buys Stake in Top Australia Gold Miner Northern Star
title_cn: 埃利奥特 (Elliott) 购买澳大利亚顶级金矿公司 Northern Star 的股份
summary: Elliott Investment Management LP has built a stake in Australia’s biggest gold miner Northern Star Resources Ltd. and is pushing for a strategic review, including a potential sale.

title: China’s State Buyer Seeks Scrutiny of New Fortescue Iron Ore
title_cn: 中国国家买家寻求对新福蒂斯丘铁矿石进行审查
summary: China’s state-backed iron ore buyer has instructed some steel mills to ask questions about Fortescue Ltd.’s new low-grade product as negotiations over a long-term supply contract hit a rough patch.

title: Japan’s 10-Year Bond Yield Drops as Smooth Auction Brings Relief
title_cn: 日本10年期债券收益率下降，顺利拍卖带来缓解
summary: Japan’s 10-year government bond yield dropped after an auction of the tenor drew firm demand as investors were attracted to high yields.

title: MAIA: McBurney: New JCPOA Unlikely Under Trump's Term
title_cn: MAIA：麦克伯尼：特朗普任期内不太可能达成新的联合全面行动计划
summary:
President Trump says Israel and Hezbollah have agreed to dial back fighting, after his talk with Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, and communication with Hezbollah through mediators. Iran said it was suspending talks with the US over fighting in Lebanon, which it says must stop as part of a broader peace deal. Niamh McBurney, Associate Director at Control Risks spoke to Bloomberg's Abeer Abu Omar on Horizons Middle East and Africa about the likelihood of a new deal between the countries.

 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gold Edges Higher as Traders Weigh Confusion Over US-Iran Talks
title_cn: 交易员对美伊谈判感到困惑，金价小幅走高
summary: Gold edged higher as traders assessed conflicting signals from the US and Iran about a diplomatic resolution to the war.

title: Why China Is Worried About AI’s Impact on Jobs
title_cn: 为什么中国担心人工智能对就业的影响
summary: Concerns are growing that AI could accelerate job losses as automation spreads across industries. In China, authorities are getting increasingly worried about how large-scale AI transformation might impact the labor market, says Matt Sheehan from the Carnegie Endowment for International Peace. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: RBI May Have Sold Gold to Save FX Reserves, BE Analysis Shows
title_cn: BE 分析显示，印度储备银行可能已出售黄金以保存外汇储备
summary: India’s central bank may have offloaded a portion of its gold holdings to shield its foreign-currency assets from the cascading fallout of the war in the Middle East, according to an analysis by Bloomberg Economics based on publicly available data.

title: Amundi Is Diversifying Risk Via Commodity Currencies, Gold
title_cn: Amundi 通过商品货币、黄金分散风险
summary: John O’Toole, head of CIO solutions at Amundi, discusses risk diversification strategies as the war in the Middle East continues and the artificial intelligence trade dominates equity markets. "We've seen opportunities in high-yielding commodity currencies for example," O’Toole tells Bloomberg Television. "We have had exposure to gold, and continue to have exposure to gold," he adds. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SK Hynix Plans to Double Capacity to Ease Memory Chip Crunch
title_cn: SK 海力士计划将产能翻倍以缓解存储芯片紧缺问题
summary: SK Hynix Inc. plans to double its memory chip capacity over the coming half-decade, a major expansion that should help ease a global shortage of an essential component of AI.

title: Russia Says It Found Foreign Spyware on Top Officials’ Phones
title_cn: 俄罗斯称在高级官员的手机上发现外国间谍软件
summary: Russia’s Federal Security Service said it uncovered a large-scale operation by foreign intelligence agencies to implant spyware on senior officials’ mobile phones.

title: Tencent Jumps After Report It’s Set to Launch WeChat AI Agent
title_cn: 有报道称腾讯将推出微信人工智能代理，股价大涨
summary: Tencent Holdings Ltd. shares advanced the most since late 2022 after a report it’s testing a prototype AI agent fueled optimism about the company’s artificial intelligence efforts.

title: MediaTek Pledges Hiring Spree to Boost Push Into New AI Spheres
title_cn: 联发科承诺大举招聘以推动新人工智能领域的发展
summary: Taiwanese chipmaker MediaTek Inc. will hike hiring to support a push into new AI activities, joining fellow tech firms in assuaging concerns about job losses in the era of artificial intelligence.

title: HPE Surges After Intense Demand for AI Buoys Sales Forecast
title_cn: 人工智能需求旺盛提振销售预测，慧与股价飙升
summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Co. shares soared in premarket trading after the company gave an outlook for annual sales that topped estimates, citing massive growth in AI-fueled demand for its servers and networking.

title: Advantech's Tsai on Nvidia Collaboration, AI Strategy
title_cn: 研华的 Tsai 谈 Nvidia 合作和人工智能战略
summary: Advantech COO and President of the Intelligent Systems Sector Linda Tsai discusses the company's collaboration with Nvidia to power next-generation AI solutions. She also lays out the company's strategic vision behind integrating AI across products and services. Linda speaks with Stephen Engle from the sidelines of 'Computex 2026' in Taipei. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: STMicro Nearly Doubles Outlook for 2026 Data Center Revenue
title_cn: STMicro 将 2026 年数据中心收入预期提高近一倍
summary: STMicroelectronics NV nearly doubled its forecast for revenue from its data centers business to $1 billion this year, fueled by booming demand for artificial intelligence infrastructure.

title: AI Productivity Boost Is Overhyped | 3-Minute MLIV
title_cn: 人工智能生产力的提升被夸大了| 3 分钟 MLIV
summary: Anna Edwards, Guy Johnson, Tom Mackenzie and Mark Cudmore break down today's key themes for analysts and investors on "Bloomberg: The Opening Trade."  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Intel's Lip-Bu Tan on Agentic AI & Partner Networks
title_cn: 英特尔的 Lip-Bu Tan 谈 Agentic AI 和合作伙伴网络
summary: Intel's Lip-Bu Tan highlights why cross-sector partnerships are critical to sustaining a vibrant tech ecosystem. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Haas Says Arm May Hit $15 Billion AI Chip Revenue Goal Early
title_cn: Haas 表示 Arm 可能提前实现 150 亿美元 AI 芯片收入目标
summary: Arm Holdings Plc Chief Executive Officer Rene Haas says the firm may achieve its target of $15 billion in sales of its own-branded chips earlier than anticipated, reflecting stronger-than-projected demand from the AI boom. Haas speaks to Bloomberg's Stephen Engle on the sidelines of the Computex trade show in Taipei. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Arm May Hit $15 Billion AI Chip Revenue Goal Early, CEO Says
title_cn: Arm CEO 表示可能提前实现 150 亿美元 AI 芯片收入目标
summary: Arm Holdings Plc may achieve its target of $15 billion in sales of its own chips earlier than anticipated, its chief executive officer said, reflecting stronger-than-projected demand from the AI boom.

title: China’s Lab-Grown Diamonds Emerge as Unlikely Winner in AI Boom
title_cn: 中国的实验室培育钻石不太可能成为人工智能热潮中的赢家
summary: China’s lab-grown diamonds are emerging as a surprising beneficiary of the artificial intelligence boom, with demand climbing while they gain traction as a key component in advanced chipmaking.

title: China’s BrainCo Sees Bionic Hand Sales Boom From Robot Makers
title_cn: 中国BrainCo看到机器人制造商的仿生手销售繁荣
summary: Chinese neurotechnology startup and prosthetics developer BrainCo expects sales of its robotic hands to surge this year as demand grows from the country’s fast-expanding humanoid robotics industry.

title: Twinco Capital Raises $190 Million for Supply-Chain Financing
title_cn: Twinco Capital 筹集 1.9 亿美元用于供应链融资
summary: European fintech firm Twinco Capital has raised a total of €165 million ($190 million) in a series B equity round and a securitization fund.

title: Schroders Renewable Unit Targets AI Assets as Power Demand Soars
title_cn: 随着电力需求飙升，施罗德可再生能源部门瞄准人工智能资产
summary: Renewable-energy investor Schroders Greencoat is targeting newer data center-linked assets as AI fuels a surge in electricity demand.

title: Pimco Says Treasury Yields Driven by Fed Bets, Not AI, for Now
title_cn: Pimco表示，目前国债收益率由美联储押注驱动，而非人工智能
summary: A boom in artificial intelligence-related borrowing may become a bigger influence on bond markets over time, but the idea that it’s behind a recent rise in long-dated Treasury yields appears overstated, according to Pacific Investment Management Co.

title: State Street's Paglia on SBI Group Partnership, ETFs
title_cn: 道富银行的 Paglia 谈 SBI Group 合作伙伴关系、ETF
summary: Anna Paglia, Executive VP and Chief Business Officer at State Street Investment Management, discusses the company's partnership with SBI Group and the outlook for ETF flows. She speaks with Haidi Stroud-Watts and Paul Allen from the sidelines of the S&P Dow Jones Indices Japan ETF Conference in Tokyo. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia Boss Says Workers Should Be Paid ‘as Much as Possible’
title_cn: 英伟达老板表示应该“尽可能多地”向工人支付工资
summary: Nvidia Corp. Chief Executive Officer Jensen Huang said he pays his workers as much as possible, weighing in on a growing global debate about how profits from the AI infrastructure boom should be shared.

title: TSE Talking With Regulator For Easing ETF Listing Rules
title_cn: TSE 与监管机构讨论放宽 ETF 上市规则
summary: Ryusuke Yokoyama, CEO at the Tokyo Stock Exchange, says the bourse is talking with the nation’s Financial Services Agency to make it easier to list a wider range of actively managed ETFs. He speaks with Haidi Stroud-Watts and Paul Allen from the sidelines of the S&P Dow Jones Indices Japan ETF Conference in Tokyo. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: S&P DJI CEO on Japan Markets, Mega IPOs
title_cn: 标普道琼斯指数首席执行官谈日本市场和大型首次公开募股
summary: Catherine Clay, CEO at S&P Dow Jones Indices, discusses the outlook for Japan's capital markets and mega IPOs in the US. She speaks with Haidi Stroud-Watts and Paul Allen from the sidelines of the S&P Dow Jones Indices Japan ETF Conference in Tokyo. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ABB Robotics on Nvidia Partnership, Physical AI
title_cn: ABB 机器人与 Nvidia 合作，物理人工智能
summary: Craig McDonnell, Business Line Managing Director Industries at ABB Robotics, discusses the company's partnership with Nvidia and the outlook for physical AI technologies. He speaks with Stephen Engle from the sidelines of Computex in Taipei. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Adds Data and AI to Trade Secret Rules to Block Leaks
title_cn: 中国将数据和人工智能纳入商业秘密规则以阻止泄密
summary: China expanded its trade secret rules to include data and algorithms, as Beijing steps up efforts to prevent technology leaks amid intensifying strategic competition with the US.

title: Nvidia Chips Sought by Chinese Labs With Military Ties
title_cn: 与军事有联系的中国实验室寻求英伟达芯片
summary: At least seven Chinese universities that support the country's armed forces and defense industry are seeking access to Nvidia Corp's H200 chips, the most powerful artificial intelligence processors ever allowed by the US to be sold in China. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: South Korea Overtakes India as World’s Sixth-Largest Stock Market
title_cn: 韩国超越印度成为全球第六大股票市场
summary: South Korea’s equity market has overtaken India’s as the world’s sixth largest, driven by a relentless surge in chip heavyweights powering the global artificial intelligence buildout.

title: Nvidia's Huang on South Korean Partnerships
title_cn: Nvidia 黄仁勋谈韩国合作伙伴关系
summary: Jensen Huang speaks to reporters in Taipei about the high potential of South Korean tech companies. He speaks as Nvidia enters the PC market with a new chip aimed at loosening the stranglehold of Intel technology in that arena. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Says Little on Yuan, So Traders Turn to AI for Insights
title_cn: 中国对人民币的态度很少，因此交易者转向人工智能寻求洞察
summary: It’s been a source of intrigue and confusion among currency traders for years. Just how does China decide each day where it’s going to set its fixing rate for the yuan — a reference point that determines its permitted trading range for the next session?

title: Alphabet to Raise $80 Billion in Equity for AI Spending
title_cn: Alphabet 将筹集 800 亿美元股权用于人工智能支出
summary: Google parent Alphabet Inc. is raising $80 billion through a package of equity offerings, including an investment deal with Berkshire Hathaway Inc., as the company races to fund its ambitious artificial intelligence spending plans.

title: Stocks up as Trump Cites Rapid Pace in Iran Talks | The Close 6/1/2026
title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗谈判进展迅速，股市上涨收盘价 2026 年 6 月 1 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are RBC Capital Markets Equity Derivatives Strategist Amy Wu Silverman, Sidley Austin Partner Kai Liekefett, Union Square Advisors President & Co-Founder Ted Smith, Bancorp’s Stephen Philipson & BTIG CEO Anton LeRoy, New York Life Investment Management Global Market Strategist Julia Hermann, Susquehanna International Group Senior Equity Research Analyst Mehdi Hosseini, House of Lords Member Dambisa Moyo, & D-Wave Quantum President & CEO Dr. Alan Baratz. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Denmark’s Leader Wins Third Term After Record-Long Talks
title_cn: 丹麦领导人在创纪录的长时间会谈后赢得第三个任期
summary: Denmark’s Prime Minister Mette Frederiksen will remain in power for a third term to oversee fractured relations with the US after a breakthrough in record-long talks to form a coalition.

title: Venezuela Loses Badly Needed Doctors Because of Trump’s Cuba Crackdown
title_cn: 由于特朗普对古巴的镇压，委内瑞拉失去了急需的医生
summary: The US push to choke off revenue flowing into Havana’s coffers is leaving countless people in poorer parts of Caracas and beyond without access to care.

title: Venezuela enfrenta un vacío en la salud tras la salida de personal médico cubano
title_cn: 古巴医务人员离开后委内瑞拉面临卫生真空
summary: La campaña de EE.UU. para cortar los ingresos que llegan a las arcas de La Habana está dejando a innumerables personas de los barrios más pobres de Caracas y de otras zonas sin acceso a la atención sanitaria.

title: Trump Tries to Stop Israel’s Lebanon Push Derailing an Iran Deal
title_cn: 特朗普试图阻止以色列对黎巴嫩的推动破坏伊朗协议
summary: President Donald Trump is still optimistic the US can reach an interim peace deal with Iran soon, after the Islamic Republic threatened to suspend talks because of Israel’s escalating attacks in Lebanon.

title: Why Turkey’s Opposition Is Struggling to Break Erdogan’s Grip
title_cn: 为什么土耳其反对派正在努力打破埃尔多安的控制
summary: Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan has long relied on divide-and-rule tactics to fend off political challengers. The approach appears to have worked remarkably well of late.

title: Burnham Says He Won’t Call Early Election If He Replaces Starmer
title_cn: 伯纳姆表示，如果他取代斯塔默，他不会提前大选
summary: Would-be UK prime minister Andy Burnham has ruled out a snap general election if he replaces Keir Starmer this summer, in an effort to tamp down speculation that Britain could be heading for an early vote.

title: AI’s Invasion of Politics Will Make for Messy Midterms
title_cn: 人工智能对政治的入侵将使中期选举变得混乱
summary: A deluge of ads is reshaping campaigns — and testing voters’ trust.

title: Senegal’s Faye Names Cabinet Excluding Pastef as Political Rift Widens
title_cn: 塞内加尔政治裂痕扩大，费耶提名不包括帕斯特夫的内阁
summary: Senegalese President Bassirou Diomaye Faye appointed a new cabinet that his estranged ally Ousmane Sonko vowed to boycott, deepening a political rift in the West African country as it navigates a debt crisis.

title: Kenya Ordered to Disclose Details of Ebola Center Deal With US
title_cn: 肯尼亚被要求披露与美国的埃博拉中心协议细节
summary: A Kenyan high court instructed the authorities to disclose details of an agreement with the US government to establish an Ebola quarantine facility in the East African nation.

title: Trump Aims to Keep Iran Peace Talks Alive
title_cn: 特朗普旨在保持伊朗和平谈判的活力
summary: President Donald Trump and Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu offered differing accounts of a call about the fighting in Lebanon, as the US struggled to get efforts toward an Iran peace deal back on track. The mismatched statements were the latest example of confusing signals on progress to end a war. Bloomberg's Abeer Abu Omar reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Cambodia Seeks Rare UN Ruling in $300 Billion Thai Energy Spat
title_cn: 柬埔寨就价值 3000 亿美元的泰国能源争端寻求联合国罕见裁决
summary: Cambodia has initiated rare United Nations compulsory conciliation proceedings against Thailand to resolve a decades-long maritime border dispute, after talks collapsed over an area both countries say holds $300 billion worth of oil and gas.

title: Iran War: Trump, Netanyahu Diverge on Lebanon Call | Daybreak Europe 06/02/2026
title_cn: 伊朗战争：特朗普和内塔尼亚胡在黎巴嫩问题上存在分歧欧洲黎明 06/02/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

President Donald Trump and Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu offered differing accounts of a call about the fighting in Lebanon, as the US struggled to get efforts toward an Iran peace deal back on track.  

And Anthropic pulled ahead of OpenAI with its confidential IPO filing Monday, as the free-spending artificial intelligence startups battle for a fundraising edge that’s set to determine who will win the ultimate battle for computing power.

Today's guests: Anna Macdonald, Hargreaves Lansdown, Investment Strategy Director; Rene Haas, Arm CEO.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: New Mandelson Files Reveal Rifts in Starmer's Government
title_cn: 新的曼德尔森文件揭示了斯塔默政府内部的裂痕
summary: The UK government on Monday published thousands of private communications between officials and ministers pertaining to Peter Mandelson’s appointment and subsequent tenure as ambassador to the US. As the governing Labour Party considers replacing Prime Minister Keir Starmer this summer, the document dump exposes the rifts that will shape a possible leadership election. Bloomberg Opinion's Rosa Prince has more. Her views are her own. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: At Least 11 Killed in Russian Missile Attack on Ukraine
title_cn: 俄罗斯导弹袭击乌克兰 至少11人死亡
summary: Russia carried out a large-scale drone and missile attack on Ukraine, killing at least eleven people including four in Kyiv and injuring more than a hundred.

title: EU Set to Give Budget Leeway to Cushion High Energy Costs
title_cn: 欧盟将给予预算回旋余地以缓解高能源成本
summary: The European Union is weighing plans to grant member states additional fiscal flexibility to cope with the impact of high energy costs due to the Iran war.

title: Officials Warn Putin That War Spending Risks Budget Crisis
title_cn: 官员警告普京战争支出可能引发预算危机
summary: Senior government officials have warned Russian President Vladimir Putin that spending on the war in Ukraine is on an unaffordable path, the most serious sign of internal division in Moscow since the full-scale invasion began. Bloomberg's Tony Halpin reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ethiopia's Incumbent Leader Expected to Win Elections
title_cn: 埃塞俄比亚现任领导人有望赢得选举
summary: Ethiopian Prime Minister Abiy Ahmed looks set to secure another five-year term following Monday’s elections, extending a tenure initially marked by sweeping reforms and later marred by civil conflict and rising regional tensions. Bloomberg's Jennifer Zabasajja reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Philippine Graft Arrest Paralyzes Senate, Clouding Duterte Trial
title_cn: 菲律宾贪污被捕导致参议院瘫痪，杜特尔特审判蒙上阴影
summary: The Philippine Senate faces a second day of deadlock after a member of its majority was arrested, throwing into doubt the progress of Vice President Sara Duterte’s impeachment trial.

title: Singapore Opposition Chief Faces Leadership Vote, CNA Reports
title_cn: 据新加坡中央社报道，新加坡反对党领袖面临领导权投票
summary: The head of Singapore’s Workers’ Party, the city-state’s main opposition block, faces a party leadership vote later this month after he was reprimanded for lying to a parliamentary committee, Channel News Asia reported Monday.

title: Russian Aircraft Production Surges as Putin Pivots to Drone War
title_cn: 普京转向无人机战争，俄罗斯飞机产量激增
summary: Even as the Kremlin’s war machine starts to lose steam after years of relentless expansion, Russia’s aircraft sector is on a tear, fueled by insatiable demand for thousands of drones.

title: Serbia's Vucic on China Relationship, EU Accession
title_cn: 塞尔维亚武契奇谈中国关系和入盟
summary: Serbian President Aleksandar Vucic discusses China relations and the Balkan nation's accession negotiations with the European Union. He speaks to Bloomberg's Oliver Crook. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: With $1 Billion of New Chinese Money, Serb Leader Warns Europe
title_cn: 塞尔维亚领导人用 10 亿美元的中国新资金警告欧洲
summary: In an interview in Belgrade, Aleksandar Vucic discusses his deepening ties with Beijing and frustration with the European Union.

title: SEC, Musk Defend Settlement After Judge Cites ‘Red Flags’
title_cn: 法官引用“危险信号”后，美国证券交易委员会和马斯克捍卫和解
summary: A proposed settlement between Elon Musk and the Securities and Exchange Commission to end the agency’s Twitter Inc. stake lawsuit came after almost a year of negotiations, attorneys for the agency said Monday after a judge raised concerns about the deal.

title: US Cuts Agricultural Equipment Tariffs on Rising Farm Costs
title_cn: 美国因农业成本上升而削减农业设备关税
summary: The White House said it will reduce tariffs on agricultural equipment, such as combines and harvesters, in order to reduce costs for US farmers and manufacturers.

title: Japan’s Takaichi Urges Passage of Vessels in Call with Iran
title_cn: 日本高市敦促与伊朗通话的船只通过
summary: Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi called for the safe passage of all vessels regardless of nation in her third phone call with Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian.

title: India to Ask US for Relief From 301 Probes in Trade Talks
title_cn: 印度要求美国解除贸易谈判中的301调查
summary: India will seek relief from any tariffs stemming from US trade investigations when negotiators from the two nations meet this week to finalize an interim deal, an official familiar with the matter said.

title: Trump Aims to Calm Lebanon Tensions to Keep Peace Talks Alive
title_cn: 特朗普旨在平息黎巴嫩紧张局势以保持和平谈判的活力
summary: President Donald Trump and Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu offered differing accounts of a call about the fighting in Lebanon, as the US struggled to get efforts toward an Iran peace deal back on track.

title: Trump Aims to Calm Lebanon Tensions, Keep Talks Alive
title_cn: 特朗普旨在平息黎巴嫩紧张局势，保持谈判活力
summary: President Donald Trump and Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu have offered differing accounts of a call about the fighting in Lebanon, as the US struggles to get efforts toward an Iran peace deal back on track. Bloomberg's Laura Davison has the latest. (Source: Bloomberg)
